name: The Back Nine Golf | Aiken, SC
about: The Back Nine Golf in Aiken is an indoor entertainment venue that combines modern golf simulator technology with a social atmosphere. The facility focuses on providing a comfortable environment for year-round golf and entertainment, appealing to both players looking to practice their swing and groups seeking a night out. While specific technical details are currently unavailable, venues of this nature typically feature state-of-the-art tracking systems in private bays to accommodate different group sizes and skill levels. The establishment is designed to function as a gathering place for the local golf community, offering a space to watch sports, play virtual rounds on famous courses, and enjoy food and drinks. This approach makes it a versatile option for casual visitors as well as those serious about improving their game in a relaxed setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Social atmosphere with food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Standard bar and grill fare typically available
Full bar service expected for this venue type

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, The Back Nine Golf provides rental clubs for you to use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are typically not permitted as the venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round on the simulator typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the number of players in your bay.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf is a family-friendly venue where children are welcome to play and enjoy the simulators.
